use_cases: User authentication and login flows for web applications
Secure credential entry with email/username and password fields
Account access for SaaS platforms and subscription services
E-commerce site customer login and checkout authentication
ai_summary: A minimalist login form component designed for user authentication on web applications. Features clean, flat UI styling with standard form inputs for credentials, built as a reusable composite component suitable for both desktop and mobile platforms across SaaS, e-commerce, and developer tool applications.
